form.title: Mate Profile
form.subtitle: Enter your info and preferences to find a matching mate.
form.prefNote: Checking "Don't care" ignores that condition when matching.
form.autoRecommend: Enable auto-recommendation (your profile will appear in recommendation lists)
form.groupApply: Allow group matching (match with groups of 2–4 mates)
form.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.
form.consentRequired: Please consent to the privacy policy.
form.successBody: Your information has been saved. Check your recommended mates in the community!

reco.title: Mate Recommendations
reco.subtitle: We recommend mates that match your conditions.
reco.empty: No mates to recommend. Fill in your profile for better matches.
reco.blindTitle: Enter your mate info to see recommendations
reco.blindSubtitle: Enter your info and preferences to find matching mates.
reco.noMatch: No mates available for matching right now.
reco.noMatchSub: Try adjusting your conditions or region.

safetyNotice.title: Safety Guidelines
safetyNotice.item1: Meet new mates for the first time in a public place.
safetyNotice.item2: Share personal contact info only after building trust.
safetyNotice.item3: Use the report feature immediately if anything makes you uncomfortable.
safetyNotice.item4: Choosing a mate with similar values and travel style leads to a better experience.

consent.title: Privacy Consent
consent.body: I agree to the collection and use of personal information (gender, age range, region, nationality, etc.) for the mate matching service. The information will only be used for mate recommendations and will be deleted upon service termination.
consent.label: I agree to the collection and use of personal information (required)
